infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Chathouse uses your microphone so you can speak in audio rooms.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Chathouse uses the camera so you can update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Chathouse needs access to your photos so you can update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Chathouse shows friends and rooms on the map when you allow location access.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Chathouse keeps your location updated so friends can find you when you're active.

plugins.photosPermission: Chathouse needs photo access to update your profile photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Chathouse shows nearby rooms on the map when you allow location access.
